situations.label: Crop Loss
situations.description: I am a farmer and I have suffered crop loss due to natural causes.

situations.label: Child Education
situations.description: I need financial support for my child's education.

situations.label: Starting a Business
situations.description: I want to start a small business or need working capital.

situations.description: I or my family member needs medical treatment or hospitalisation.

situations.label: Housing Support
situations.description: I need support to build or repair my house.

situations.label: Financial Distress
situations.description: I am facing serious financial difficulty and need government support.

situations.label: Women & Girl Child Welfare
situations.description: I need schemes related to the welfare of women or my girl child.

situations.label: Senior Citizen Support
situations.description: I am a senior citizen and need government support or pension.

situations.label: Skill Development
situations.description: I want to learn new skills or take vocational training.

situations.label: Agriculture Support
situations.description: I am a farmer and need general agriculture support or subsidies.

situations.label: Food & Nutrition Support
situations.description: I am struggling to afford food for my family.

situations.label: Accident / Death in Family
situations.description: I or a family member suffered an accident, or there has been a death in the family.

situations.label: Pregnancy & Maternity
situations.description: I am pregnant or a new mother needing health and financial support.
